name: mrnsmh--openclaw-skill-brave-rotator
description: Brave Search API with automatic key rotation across multiple API keys to maximize free tier limits (2000 req/month per key). Use when performing web, news, or image searches via Brave Search API, especially when multiple API keys are available and you want to avoid rate limits. Triggers on web search requests, news lookups, image searches, any task requiring Brave Search API calls with key rotation or fallback.
